issue_title: FFMPEG_ARGS for `-preset veryfast` does not seem to take effect, an error will be reported when ffmpeg runs
issue_body_preview: **Describe the bug** I encountered a command parsing error when using ffmpeg for conversion. After checking, I found it was because I had set `FFMPEG_ARGS=-preset veryfast -threads 2` in my environment. After commenting it out, it indeed no longer reports an error
test_description_zh: 在环境变量中设置 FFMPEG_ARGS（例如 FFMPEG_ARGS=-preset veryfast -threads 2），然后在页面上上传一个视频文件并选择使用 ffmpeg 进行格式转换，观察转换过程是否正常完成。
expected_result_zh: 视频文件转换应正常完成，不会因为 FFMPEG_ARGS 环境变量的参数解析错误而报错，转换结果文件应可正常下载。
